description: Replace Google Drive OCR fallback with OCR.space API for simpler configuration (just needs API key instead of service account)
steps: Remove googleapis import and performOcrWithGoogleDrive function from route.js
Add performOcrWithOcrSpace function that uses OCR.space free API with FormData
Add Japanese date pattern detection (YYYY年MM月DD日) in findDatesInText
Run npm install to remove googleapis packages
Run npm run build to verify the build passes
acceptance_criteria: performOcrWithOcrSpace function sends PDF URL to OCR.space API
Error message guides user to get free API key at https://ocr.space/ocrapi/freekey
Japanese date patterns (YYYY年MM月DD日) are detected directly in OCR text
Same flow preserved: pdf-parse first, OCR.space fallback, manual error
npm run build succeeds with exit code 0
verification: Run 'npm run build' in /projects/sandbox/cv-portal and confirm it exits with code 0
Check that package.json does NOT contain googleapis
Read route.js and confirm OCR.space integration is present
findings: Build passes. Removed googleapis (41 packages removed). OCR.space API integration uses FormData with url, language=jpn, OCREngine=2, filetype=PDF. Added Japanese date pattern matching for direct YYYY年MM月DD日 detection in OCR output.
